testcase.name: test_update_company_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quotation_builder.py:165: in test_update_company_profile assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sales_cannot_write_company_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: sales should not write company profile, got 500 assert 500 in (401, 403) + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quotation_builder.py:181: in test_sales_cannot_write_company_profile assert r.status_code in (401, 403), f"sales should not write company profile, got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: sales should not write company profile, got 500 E assert 500 in (401, 403) E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_recalc_intra_vs_inter
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quotation_builder.py:227: in test_recalc_intra_vs_inter assert d3["tax_mode"] == "inter", d3 E AssertionError: {'tax_mode': 'intra', 'totals': {'basic': 151000.0, 'cgst': 13477.5, 'discount': 1250.0, 'grand_total': 176705.0, ...}} E assert 'intra' == 'inter' E E - inter E ? - E + intra E ? +
